creator: luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
text:
Using compiler:c++14-lang instead of compiler:c++11-lib in the USES line solves the issue on FreeBSD 10.3, forcing to use a more recent clang version if the installed one is older than 3.5

No extra clang is installed on FreeBSD 11.x

I've added the same comment on the review as well
